'''jashaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiberwood|fiberwood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiberwood|fiberwood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jashaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || jæshæhæth || jæshæhæj || jæshæhæsh || jæshæhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || jashashahath || jashashahaj || jashashahash || jashashaha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || jashahath || jashahaj || jashahash || jashaha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || jashafhafth || jashafhafj || jashafhafsh || jashafhaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || jashahatha || jashahaja || jashahasha || jashahaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || jashahath || jashahaj || jashahash || jashaha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || jashahathal || jashahajal || jashahashal || jashahakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || jashahaathatha || jashahaajaja || jashahaashasha || jashahaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || jashahathan || jashahajan || jashahashan || jashahakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || jashahathaoro || jashahajaoro || jashahashaoro || jashahakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
